'''wadhunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherstick|featherstick]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherstick|featherstick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wadhunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædhinith|wædhinith]] || [[word:wædhinij|wædhinij]] || [[word:wædhinish|wædhinish]] || [[word:wædhini|wædhini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadhudhunuth|wadhudhunuth]] || [[word:wadhudhunuj|wadhudhunuj]] || [[word:wadhudhunush|wadhudhunush]] || [[word:wadhudhunu|wadhudhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadhunuth|wadhunuth]] || [[word:wadhunuj|wadhunuj]] || [[word:wadhunush|wadhunush]] || [[word:wadhunu|wadhunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadhufnuth|wadhufnuth]] || [[word:wadhufnuj|wadhufnuj]] || [[word:wadhufnush|wadhufnush]] || [[word:wadhufnuf|wadhufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadhunuthu|wadhunuthu]] || [[word:wadhunuju|wadhunuju]] || [[word:wadhunushu|wadhunushu]] || [[word:wadhunuku|wadhunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadhunuth|wadhunuth]] || [[word:wadhunuj|wadhunuj]] || [[word:wadhunush|wadhunush]] || [[word:wadhunu|wadhunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadhunuthul|wadhunuthul]] || [[word:wadhunujul|wadhunujul]] || [[word:wadhunushul|wadhunushul]] || [[word:wadhunukul|wadhunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadhunuthuthu|wadhunuthuthu]] || [[word:wadhunujuju|wadhunujuju]] || [[word:wadhunushushu|wadhunushushu]] || [[word:wadhunuku|wadhunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadhunuthun|wadhunuthun]] || [[word:wadhunujun|wadhunujun]] || [[word:wadhunushun|wadhunushun]] || [[word:wadhunukun|wadhunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadhunuthuoro|wadhunuthuoro]] || [[word:wadhunujuoro|wadhunujuoro]] || [[word:wadhunushuoro|wadhunushuoro]] || [[word:wadhunukuoro|wadhunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
